01003.name: "Skids" O'Toole
01003.text:
[fast] During your turn, spend 2 resources: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per turn.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. If you succeed, gain 2 resources.

01016.name: .45 Automatic
01016.text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01018.name: Beat Cop
01018.text:
You get +1 [combat].
[fast] Discard Beat Cop: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

01020.name: Machete
01020.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is the only enemy engaged with you, this attack deals +1 damage.

01022.name: Evidence!
01022.text:
Fast. Play after you defeat an enemy.
Discover 1 clue at your location.

01028.name: Beat Cop
01028.text:
You get +1 [combat].
[fast] Exhaust Beat Cop and deal 1 damage to it: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

01047.name: .41 Derringer
01047.text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

01049.name: Hard Knocks
01049.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

01051.name: Backstab
01051.text: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. This attack deals +2 damage.

01056.name: Sure Gamble
01056.text:
Fast. Play after you reveal a chaos token with a negative modifier.
Switch that token's "-" to a "+".

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01091.name: Overpower
01091.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01096.name: Amnesia
01096.text: Revelation - Choose and discard all but 1 card from your hand.

01117.name: Lita Chantler
01117.text:
While you control Lita Chantler, she gains:
"Each investigator at your location gets +1 [combat].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location successfully attacks a [[Monster]] enemy: That investigator deals +1 damage."

01121b.name: The Masked Hunter
01121b.text: Spawn - Engaged with Prey. Prey - Most clues. Hunter. The Masked Hunter gets +2 health per investigator. While you are engaged with The Masked Hunter, you cannot discover or spend clues.

01138.name: Herman Collins
01138.text: Spawn - Graveyard. [action] Choose and discard 4 cards from your hand: Parley. Add Herman Collins to the victory display.

01139.name: Peter Warren
01139.text: Spawn - Miskatonic University. [action] Spend 2 clues: Parley. Add Peter Warren to the victory display.

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01145.name: Vengeance Awaits
01145.text: Forced - When this agenda advances: - If the investigators are at Act 1, put the set-aside Ritual Site into play and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there. - If the investigators are at Act 2 or 3, discard all enemies at the Ritual Site and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there.

01147.name: Into the Darkness
01147.text: Objective - If an investigator enters the Ritual Site, advance.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01150.name: Arkham Woods
01150.text: Forced - After you enter this location: Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage.

01152.name: Arkham Woods
01152.text: This location is investigated using [willpower] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01154.name: Arkham Woods
01154.text: This location is investigated using [combat] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01156.name: Ritual Site
01156.text: Forced - At the end of the round, if there are fewer than 2 clues per investigator on Ritual Site: Add clues to it until it has 2 clues per investigator on it.

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01166.name: Ancient Evils
01166.text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

01175.name: Screeching Byakhee
01175.text: Prey - Lowest remaining sanity. Hunter. While engaged with an investigator with remaining sanity 4 or fewer, Screeching Byakhee gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01176.name: The Yellow Sign
01176.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 2 horror and search your deck for a [[Madness]] weakness. Draw that card and shuffle your deck.

50036.name: Arkham Woods
50036.text: Forced - After you reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag during an evasion attempt at this location: Reveal and resolve an additional chaos token. (Limit once per test.)

50038.name: Grave-Eater
50038.text: Forced - After Grave-Eater attacks you: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

50039.name: Acolyte of Umôrdhoth
50039.text:
Prey - Fewest cards in hand.
While engaged with an investigator with no cards in his or her hand, Acolyte of Umôrdhoth cannot be evaded.

50044.name: Jeremiah Pierce
50044.text:
Spawn - Your House. Otherwise, Rivertown.
[action]: Parley. Add Jeremiah Pierce to the victory display. Then, test [willpower] (4). Place 1 doom on the current agenda for each point you fail by (this can cause the current agenda to advance).

50045.name: Billy Cooper
50045.text:
Spawn - Easttown.
Forced - After a [[Monster]] enemy is defeated at Billy Cooper's location: Add Billy Cooper to the victory display.

50046.name: Alma Hill
50046.text:
Spawn - Southside.
[action]: Parley. Draw the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Then, add Alma Hill to the victory display.
